title: Netherite Road 2
description: A Version 1.16.5 and above of Netherite Alloy tech/utility/adventure mod.
body:
Netherite Road 2 is a technology/practical/adventure Mod that expands Netherite content and adds Netherite related content in Minecraft version 1.16.5 and above.


# **Matters needing attention**

**Currently Netherite Road 2 of Forge version 1.16.5 has stopped supporting**, and is being developed to 1.18.2. However, you can still play this mod in 1.16.5.

Netherite Road 2 Forge version 1.16.5 must rely on the FE power cable and FE generator of other technical mods for the Ancient Purifier to work. It does not support compatibility with the logistics systems of other mods, but it can be accessed via hopper.


# Contents

1.16.5-Forge: This version of Netherite Road 2 has a lot of technical features. Netherite scissors are highly durable and can be used as scissors, Ancient Purifiers can mass produce netherite and diamond, and silver swords can cause higher damage to undead creatures.


# Future mod development plan

In the future, we will start to make and supplement the content of the entire Netherite Road 2, collect a lot of opinions and ideas, improve the structure of the entire mod, and add support for more mods at the same time.


## Will there be Netherite Road 3?

No, Netherite Road 2 will never have an official third generation, but if you have any further ideas about nether-themed mods, welcome!


# Acknowledgement

Thank you for your help from the **PrincipleDEV** development team!
